name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photos M81821] This Slender wallet is crafted in retro-style blue Monogram coated canvas, accented with LV Initials leather patches, exuding a nostalgic charm. Slim and practical, it features a bill compartment and eight card slots. Dimensions 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm
